NarrativeOS

Extension Settings

Server Configuration
URL of your NarrativeOS server (dev: localhost:3001)
Not tested
How to Connect
Step 1: Start your NarrativeOS server
Step 2: Go to Settings → Extension tab in the dashboard
Step 3: Copy your extension token
Step 4: Paste it in the extension popup and click Connect

Default production API URL: https://project-x-lilac.vercel.app/api
For local dev, use: http://localhost:3000/api
Debug Info
